crons.name: 🌐 Spicy Chat - Web Roleplay App
crons.prompt:
AI roleplay web app for spicy/adult content.

**Based on:** Chatty Chat spec (5274 lines)
**Platform:** Web (accessible via Tailscale)

**13 Phases:**
1. Foundation (stack, DB, Docker)
2. Core UI (messenger, characters)
3. AI Integration (LLM, images, TTS, video)
4. Branching & Editing
5. Personas
6. Group Chats
7. Media & Gallery
8. Unprompted Messages
9. Story Mode
10. Visual Novel Mode
11. RPG System
12. Haptics/Lovense
13. Polish & Deployment

**Deployment:**
- Self-hosted on NAS
- Access via Tailscale (private network)

**69 Subtasks Total**

Subtasks:
- [Phase 1] Review Chatty Chat spec (5274 lines) for feature parity
- [Phase 1] Choose web stack: Frontend (React/Svelte/Vue) + Backend (FastAPI/Node)
- [Phase 1] Set up backend project structure (FastAPI/Express + PostgreSQL/SQLite)
- [Phase 1] Set up frontend project structure with chosen framework
- [Phase 1] Design database schema: Characters, Conversations, Messages, Personas, Media
- [Phase 1] Set up Docker containers for backend services
- [Phase 1] Configure Tailscale access for local network
- [Phase 2] Build messenger-style chat list UI (friends list, last message, timestamps)
- [Phase 2] Build chat conversation UI (message bubbles, input, send button)
- [Phase 2] Implement WebSocket connection for real-time messaging
- [Phase 2] Build character creation form (5 steps: Basic, Personality, Appearance, Clothing, AI)
- [Phase 2] Implement character avatar upload/selection
- [Phase 2] Build character profile view with all details
- [Phase 2] Implement character edit/delete functionality
- [Phase 3] Connect to local LLM (Ollama/vLLM/llama.cpp) with OpenAI-compatible API
- [Phase 3] Implement character system prompts with personality/backstory injection
- [Phase 3] Build streaming text response handler (token-by-token display)
- [Phase 3] Connect to local image generation (ComfyUI/Automatic1111)
- [Phase 3] Implement contextual image generation (character sends pics based on conversation)
- [Phase 3] Connect to local TTS (Piper/Coqui) for audio responses
- [Phase 3] Add voice selection per character with speed/pitch controls
- [Phase 3] Connect to local video generation server (if available)
- [Phase 4] Implement message editing (edit any message, creates new branch)
- [Phase 4] Build branch management UI (arrows under messages, branch list)
- [Phase 4] Implement branch switching (view different conversation paths)
- [Phase 4] Add branch rename/delete functionality
- [Phase 4] Implement message deletion (deletes message + all following in branch)
- [Phase 5] Build persona model (different user profiles with separate chats)
- [Phase 5] Create persona management UI (create, edit, delete personas)
- [Phase 5] Implement persona switching from menu (each persona has own chats)
- [Phase 6] Build group chat model (multiple characters in one conversation)
- [Phase 6] Implement group creation UI (select characters to add)
- [Phase 6] Build AI orchestrator for group responses (who responds, in what order)
- [Phase 6] Add group chat UI (show which character is typing, color-coded messages)
- [Phase 7] Build per-conversation gallery (all images/videos from that chat)
- [Phase 7] Implement soft delete for media (remove from chat, keep in gallery)
- [Phase 7] Add media viewer with zoom/fullscreen
- [Phase 7] Implement media download/export
- [Phase 8] Build scheduler service for unprompted character messages
- [Phase 8] Implement configurable timing (per-conversation silence threshold)
- [Phase 8] Add UI toggle for unprompted messages per conversation
- [Phase 9] Build story mode model (separate from chat, narrative-focused)
- [Phase 9] Create story mode UI (narrative display, action buttons)
- [Phase 9] Implement story brain (AI generates narrative, tracks plot)
- [Phase 9] Add story branching (choices affect narrative path)
- [Phase 10] Build 4-choice interface (Visual Novel style)
- [Phase 10] Implement visual continuity system (consistent character appearance in images)
- [Phase 10] Add background scene generation (location images)
- [Phase 10] Integrate messaging into visual novel (choices → chat)
- [Phase 11] Build RPG stat system (STR, DEX, INT, CHA, etc.)
- [Phase 11] Implement dice roll system (d20, d100, etc.)
- [Phase 11] Build deterministic rules engine (separate from AI, fair resolution)
- [Phase 11] Add XP and leveling system
- [Phase 11] Create character sheet UI (stats, skills, inventory)
- [Phase 12] Research Lovense API integration (local network control)
- [Phase 12] Build haptics command model (pattern, intensity, duration, device)
- [Phase 12] Implement AI-driven haptics (character triggers device based on scene)
- [Phase 12] Add manual haptics controls (user can trigger manually)
- [Phase 12] Build haptics settings UI (device pairing, intensity limits)
- [Phase 13] Add loading states, error handling, toast notifications
- [Phase 13] Implement responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [Phase 13] Add dark/light theme support
- [Phase 13] Build settings page (AI providers, TTS, haptics, preferences)
- [Phase 13] Implement data export/import (backup conversations, characters)
- [Phase 13] Add onboarding flow (first-time setup, character creation)
- [Phase 13] Deploy on NAS with Docker Compose
- [Phase 13] Test Tailscale access from external network
- [Phase 13] Performance testing and optimization
- [Phase 13] Final polish and bug fixes
